series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes electronic and paper records for school and district performance awards presented by the SBOE, Ohio Department of Education, and USDOE. May include, but not limited to Overall A Award, All A Award, Momentum Award, Schools of Honor:( High Progress, High Performing), Schools Of Promise, Blue Ribbon Schools, Milken National Educator Awards and PAEMST(The Presidential Awards for Excellence in Mathematics and Science Teaching).
